channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Freakiest Cult Movie You’ve Never Seen Is Now on Shudder
item.description: ‘Messiah of Evil’ was released in 1974; its creators went on to make ‘Howard the Duck’ and pen ‘Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom.’

item.title: The new MacBook Pro laptops are up to $400 more expensive than their predecessors, thanks to the RAM shortage
item.description: With the demands for more computers and data centers to power AI, the market is experiencing a shortage of RAM, causing memory prices to surge.

item.title: Hacked traffic cams and hijacked TVs: How cyber operations supported the war against Iran
item.description: After U.S. and Israeli forces started bombing Iran, reports say cyber operations have disrupted communications, supporting surveillance activities, and have been used in psychological operations.

item.title: New MacBooks, the iPhone 17E, and more: everything we know about Apple’s March 2026 announcements
item.description: Apple is kicking off March with a flurry of product announcements ahead of a “special Apple experience” on March 4th in New York City, London, and Shanghai. Apple started on March 2nd by announcing the iPhone 17E. The new $599 phone has a lot of welcome additions over the iPhone 16E like support for MagSafe […]

item.title: Activist investor Elliot takes a $1B stake in Pinterest, betting on AI-driven growth
item.description: Activist Investor Elliott Investment Management has taken a $1 billion stake in Pinterest.

item.title: Google patches 129 Android security flaws — including a potentially dangerous Qualcomm zero-day
item.description: One of the bugs was exploited in the wild and ten were deemed critical.

item.title: Apple’s rumored MacBook Neo, a lower-cost, colorful laptop, could launch this week
item.description: This would mark the first time Apple competes with cheaper hardware like the Chromebook.

item.title: Historian Finds Copy of 16th-Century Astronomy Textbook—Belonging to Galileo
item.description: The renowned physicist, mathematician, and philosopher would later reject the ideas presented in this very book.

item.title: I can't believe I'm saying this, but a more expensive MacBook Air M5 is wonderful news — here's why
item.description: The MacBook Air M5 is more expensive than the M4 version, but there is an important silver lining that may make you think differently about the new 13-inch laptop.

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia is the highest-rated Pokémon game since X/Y on Metacritic, and it's not even out on Nintendo Switch 2 yet
item.description: Pokémon Pokopia launches on Nintendo Switch 2 this week, and it's already Metacritic's highest-rated Pokémon game of all time.

item.title: “AI in networks isn’t CPU vs. GPU”: Intel unveils 18A-based Clearwater Forest Xeon 6+ for edge AI and early 6G infrastructure
item.description: Intel expands Xeon 6 lineup with 288-core Clearwater Forest Xeon 6+ targeting AI workloads in 5G networks.

item.title: Game Pass additions for March include Cyberpunk 2077 and F1 25
item.description: Microsoft has revealed the first wave of Xbox Game Pass additions for March. Cyberpunk 2077 and F1 25 headline the batch; the former is coming to both Ultimate and Premium tiers. Hollow Knight: Silksong, which launched about six months ago, is also on the way to Premium. Final Fantasy III and Kingdom Come: Deliverance II had been previously announced and are both available starting today. Both games can be played straight from the cloud or downloaded to the Xbox Series X/S as well as PC across all Game Pass tiers. F1 25 joins Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass on March 4. For Ultimate subscri...

item.title: WhatsApp qui continue à rechercher « volontairement » dans vos messages des contenus pédopornographiques ? Cette commission du Parlement européen dit non
item.description: En attendant que le règlement européen contre les abus sexuels sur les mineurs en ligne (CSAM ou ChatControl pour ses opposants) soit adopté, les législateurs européens cherchent à prolonger le régime actuel qui permet aux plateformes et messageries de scanner nos conversations à des fins de détection de contenus pédopornographiques, sur la base du volontariat. Alors que la règle est sur le point d'expirer, une commission du Parlement européen a voté contre son prolongement, lundi 2 mars....

item.title: Live Nation antitrust trial begins: How the DOJ’s case against Ticketmaster could reshape the concert industry
item.description: The DOJ says Ticketmaster’s parent company broke antitrust law. A breakup is unlikely, but the trial could still force changes. After nearly two years of pretrial motions, opening arguments are expected to begin Tuesday in the Justice Department’s lawsuit against Live Nation. The case could have dramatic ramifications for the live events business—though that outcome is far from guaranteed....

item.title: Sharks new scrubbing-centric robot vacuum finds stains with a UV light. I tested it against other top robot mops.
item.description: The Shark UV Reveal can find dried stains that other robovacs miss. But at $1,299.99, its inability to mop large spills may be a dealbreaker.

item.title: Google accelerates Chrome release cycle
item.description: Google is moving its Chrome browser to a two-week release cycle, instead of the current four, or the six-week cycle that existed for the decade before that. The change starts in September. "Building on our history of adapting our release process to match the demands of a modern web, Chrome is moving to a two-week […]

item.title: Microsoft’s big developer conference returns to San Francisco in June
item.description: Microsoft is moving its annual Build developer conference from Seattle back to San Francisco and making some changes along the way. This year, the event will be held at Fort Mason, the former US Army post located in the San Francisco Bay Area, instead of the bustling downtown of Seattle. Microsoft is moving Build to […]

item.title: Amid new competition, Chrome speeds up its release schedule
item.description: Google Chrome will begin shipping new releases every two weeks in September, instead of monthly.

item.title: After more than eight months with the Nintendo Switch 2, I still can’t get over this one performance upgrade — and it's got nothing to do with visuals or framerate
item.description: I love this Nintendo Switch 2 performance upgrade so much that I wouldn’t even dare to play my old Switch ever again.

item.title: How to watch F1 2026 from anywhere with this VPN deal
item.description: How to watch F1 2026 for free from anywhere with a VPN. McLaren's reigning champion Lando Norris and Mercedes' George Russell are feeling optimistic.

item.title: OnePlus president teases record-breaking OnePlus 15T smartphone — but I’m far more interested in the OnePlus 16
item.description: OnePlus 15T’s thin bezels are a boring upgrade; if leaks are true, the OnePlus 16 is the upgrade to wait for.

item.title: Elon Musk’s ‘self-driving’ delusions get a reality check
item.description: The electric carmaker says its ‘Full Self-Driving’ claims aren’t misleading. The law takes a different view. Two months ago, a state administrative judge in California determined that Tesla broke the law by misleading consumers. The argument: Tesla led them to believe that its cars had real self-driving capabilities, calling them “Autopilot” and “Full Self-Driving” (commonly known as FSD). The issue is that Teslas can’t really drive by themselves; they still require drivers to remain constantly vigilant to prevent catastrophe. The verdict prompted the California Department of Motor Vehicles to...

item.title: Stock market update: Dow, Nasdaq, and S&P fall as Iran uncertainty abounds
item.description: Roughly 20% of the world’s oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz. Its sudden closure is forcing investors to reassess energy prices, corporate costs, and how fragile global trade remains in 2026. America’s three major stock markets, the Dow, Nasdaq, and S&P, are all down sharply in morning trading as of this writing. The wave of red across investors’ monitors is primarily due to one major factor: uncertainty around how far the Iran conflict will travel and how long it will last. Here’s what you need to know about how markets are reacting....

item.title: How to watch Barcelona vs. Atlético Madrid in the Copa del Rey online for free
item.description: How to watch Copa del Rey for free. Live stream Barcelona vs. Atlético Madrid in the 2026 Copa del Rey for free.

item.title: Ce vidéoprojecteur LED en promo à 269 € transforme votre salon en cinéma Full HD avec écran 200″, pop-corn non inclus
item.description: Le Yaber Projector K3 est un bon petit vidéoprojecteur Full HD avec une luminosité élevée et un système audio intégré de qualité, à retrouver pour 269,90 euros chez Joybuy au lieu de 600 euros.

item.title: BYD déploie massivement sa technologie de recharge aussi rapide qu’un plein d’essence en Chine avant son arrivée en Europe
item.description: En testant discrètement un système de charge à 1 500 kW dans les rues de Shenzhen, BYD vient de franchir un seuil historique. Une puissance quasiment inimaginable il y a cinq ans, qui redéfinit ce que "recharge rapide" veut dire : moins de 10 minutes, top chrono.

item.title: The Audacity trailer skewers the billionaire man-children of Silicon Valley
item.description: Based on the trailer for AMC's upcoming "The Audacity." Silicon Valley looks like a nightmare.

item.title: You can soon live out your James Bond fantasies with retractable stud winter tires
item.description: In 1987's The Living Daylights, James Bond presses a dashboard button to activate retractable tire studs, giving the Aston Martin V8 Vantage he's driving more traction on a frozen lake. That tire technology is no longer limited to the movies. Later this year, Finnish tire brand Nokian is planning to launch a new snow tire […]

item.title: Dont miss the Bluetti Elite 10 mini portable power station for its lowest price yet
item.description: As of March 3, get the Bluetti Elite 10 mini portable power station for its lowest price yet

item.title: Warner Bros.’ Plans for ‘Game of Thrones’ Might Include an Aegon the Conqueror Movie
item.description: 'Andor' writer Beau Willimon has reportedly filed a script for a new Westeros movie.

item.title: Hands-on with the Honor Magic V6 — the stunning new foldable with 'world’s thinnest mobile phone battery'
item.description: The Honor Magic V6 boasts a refined design, an impressive camera with a 1-inch sensor and a variable telephoto zoom, plus a huge battery.

item.title: Galaxy S26 Ultra : on vous montre tous les compromis de l’affichage confidentiel
item.description: Nos tests sur l'écran du Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra montrent à quel point le filtre confidentiel altère la qualité d'affichage. C'est pourtant loin d'être un défaut.

item.title: Everything Apple announced this week: iPhone 17e, new MacBooks, M4 iPad Air and more
item.description: Apple has promised a “big week” for the company, which includes an in-person event for press and creators on March 4. But it didn’t exactly wait until Wednesday to get things started. The news started on Monday with the announcements of the iPhone 17e and M4-powered iPad Air. The company followed up on Tuesday with the reveal of the M5 MacBook Air, the M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, MacBook Pro models that use said chips, a refreshed Studio Display and a brand-new 27-inch Studio Display XDR. In addition, ahead of an official announcement, Apple leaked news of a cheaper MacBook called the MacBook Neo...

item.title: Audible launches a cheaper ‘Standard’ subscription plan, challenging Spotify
item.description: Under the new Standard plan, subscribers will lose access to the audiobooks they've consumed when they unsubscribe. The Premium plan lets users keep the audiobooks they’ve listened to even if they unsubscribe.

item.title: Watch out - Gemini will now remember all your work chats, and display them right in Google Workspace
item.description: Google adds new Gemini conversation history and auto chat deletion controls for Workspace customers.

item.title: Grand ménage de printemps chez Roborock : jusqu’à -650 euros sur ses meilleurs aspirateurs-robots [Sponso]
item.description: Roborock célèbre le printemps avec de belles promotions sur ses meilleurs aspirateurs-robots. La marque affiche jusqu’à 650 euros de remise sur ses robots d’ici au 16 mars 2026.

item.title: Get the massive Anker Solix F3800 portable power station, an expansion battery, and a 400W solar panel for over half off
item.description: The Anker Solix F3800 portable power station, BP3800 Expansion Battery, and 400W solar panel bundle is on sale at Amazon for $3,598.98, down from the list price of $7,397. That's a 51% discount.

item.title: Les nouveaux MacBook Air et Pro ne sont plus fournis avec un adaptateur secteur en France
item.description: Même si Apple a réussi à ne pas faire exploser les prix de ses nouveaux MacBook malgré la flambée des coûts de la mémoire, il n’empêche : ces machines représentent tout de même un investissement conséquent. Et il faudra ajouter à la facture un adaptateur secteur, que le constructeur ne fournit plus !

item.title: Notre sélection des meilleurs chargeurs rapides pour smartphone ou PC
item.description: Quel chargeur rapide acheter pour votre smartphone ? Toutes les normes de charge ne se ressemblent pas entre Samsung, Apple, Google, Xiaomi, Oppo… Découvrez notre sélection de chargeurs rapides pour smartphones, PC ou même votre casque audio.

item.title: Blink's latest Outdoor Camera 2K+ 'takes home security to the next level' — and it just got its first-ever discount
item.description: The Blink Outdoor Camera 2K+ has just been released, but it's already 50% off in this excellent Amazon deal ahead of the Spring Deal Days event.

item.title: Blue Prince is out on Switch 2 today, complete with mouse control
item.description:
The unique and highly addictive roguelike Blue Prince is now available for Switch 2, as announced at today's Nintendo Indie World Showcase. This version allows for mouse control, via the underutilized Joy-Con feature. This is a wonderfully designed puzzle game that oozes atmosphere. The game tasks players with exploring a gigantic mansion, but there's a twist. You actually build this mansion as you explore, room by room. This is done by placing what can only be described as magical blueprints.
The goal is to fully explore the mansion and solve its many, many mysteries. However, there are only...

item.title: Get Samsungs stunning QN90F Neo QLED TV for its cheapest price ever
item.description: The Samsung 43-inch QN90F Neo QLED 4K TV is on sale at Amazon for under $800. That's nearly 40% off its list price.

item.title: Skip the all-new Galaxy Buds 4 Pro — the excellent Buds Pro 3 earbuds are now cheaper than ever at Walmart
item.description: No need to preorder Samsung's Galaxy Buds 4 Pro, I recommend buying the Galaxy Buds Pro earbuds for a record-low price of just $104 at Walmart.

item.title: Theres a 32-inch TCL QLED TV on sale for $99.99 at Best Buy — snag it on March 3 only
item.description: Need a new bedroom or kitchen TV? This 32-inch QLED TCL TV will look much better in bright and dark rooms than a regular LED TV.

item.title: Blue Prince just got a Switch 2 release date, alongside 17 more game announcements — here are the top 3 games from the latest Indie World Showcase coming to the Switch consoles that I'm most excited for
item.description: The Indie World Showcase for March 2026 has wrapped! Here are the top three Nintendo Switch games from the presentation I'm most looking forward to.

item.title: Looking for a budget-friendly, subscription-free security camera? I've been hands-on with the IMOU Cell 3C, and it could be exactly what you need
item.description: This wireless camera is one of the most affordable security systems around, with no subscription necessary.

item.title: En pleine pénurie de RAM, Boulanger casse en deux le prix de ce laptop HP équipé de 32 Go
item.description: Remise XXL chez Boulanger qui se charge de retirer 550 euros au prix de cet HP OmniBook 5. L'occasion de profiter d'un solide PC portable équipé d'un écran OLED et de plus de 30 heures d'autonomie.

item.title: How to preorder Apples new M5 MacBook Airs
item.description: Apple has announced M5 MacBook Airs with 512GB of starting storage and updated wireless connectivity. Preorders open March 4.

item.title: No, the sub-$500 PC market will not disappear by 2028 - Au contraire, I expect it to thrive. Here's why
item.description: The sub-$500 PC market is huge and yet Gartner wants us to believe that it will disappear within 100 weeks.

item.title: Apple’s website leaks MacBook ‘Neo,’ which could be its new cheaper laptop
item.description: On Tuesday, during Apple's weeklong product launch event, a listing for the "MacBook Neo (Model A3404)" appeared on a regulatory compliance page on Apple's website under its lineup of 2026 MacBooks. First spotted by MacRumors, the listing appears to be an accident and has since been removed, but may have been a leaked reference to […]

item.title: 4-Body Problem: Astronomers Spot the Most Tightly Packed Quadruple Star System Yet
item.description: The four-star system features three stars in stable orbits, plus a fourth at a distance equal to Jupiter's orbit around our Sun.

item.title: EA continues to ‘evolve’ The Sims 4 with new virtual currency and a ‘maker’ program
item.description: EA is adding some big changes to The Sims 4: Later this month, it's introducing an in-game marketplace where users can buy creator-made items using a new in-game currency called "Moola." The announcements mark another big shift for the game, which went free to play back in 2022. Creators who want to sell in-game items […]

item.title: Conférence sur l’IA | ALL IN à Vancouver et à Toronto avant Montréal
item.description: La conférence annuelle montréalaise ALL IN, la plus importante au Canada à être dédiée à l’intelligence artificielle (IA), prendra de l’expansion en 2026 avec le lancement des « ALL IN Talks ».

item.title: X begins testing standalone X Chat app on iOS
item.description: The new app promises a way to send and receive messages without being distracted by your timeline.
